candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total because same values and more specific/non-total.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; less preferred because it is a total.
Not revenue; candidate list includes it but conceptually incorrect for REVT.

variables.notes: Use Revenue first; Total Revenue as fallback for label changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and preferred over duplicate alias/balancing rows.
Equivalent COGS alias with identical values; useful fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Explicit balancing row, so should not be selected when direct COGS rows exist.

variables.notes: Priority list of direct COGS labels; exclude balancing row.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-style overhead row and populated; per rules, select only this row when explicit SG&A exists.
Administrative overhead component, but should not be added when explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Administrative overhead component, but should not be added when explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Could include overhead but is broader/mixed and below operating line items; less clean than explicit SG&A row.
Potential overhead component, but preview empty and explicit SG&A row already exists.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so select only that row per hierarchy rule.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line.
Broad finance cost line; acceptable fallback if specific interest expense line unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortized cost
candidates.why: Specific interest expense line; best conceptual match for XINT.
Interest-related but narrower and not preferred over core debt interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific interest expense subtype; useful fallback for some years.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortized cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list prefers specific reported interest expense, then lease-interest supplemental, then broader financial expenses if needed. Excludes balance-sheet accrual and derivative-specific interest from final priority.

candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity for the shareholders in the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting with MIB.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred when parent-only equity exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Balancing row, not equity.
Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity for the shareholders in the parent company

variables.notes: Prefer parent-company equity to exclude NCI. Total equity included only as fallback for possible label change across years, though parent equity is clearly preferred.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings to NCI, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement comprehensive income allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; useful fallback.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet minority/NCI lines only; exclude income statement profit-allocation lines.
